views.name: DashboardView
views.purpose: Recipe collection overview showing total count, favorites, cuisine diversity donut chart, most-cooked recipes, recently added list, and quick-add FAB

views.name: EntrySheet
views.purpose: Add or edit recipe with structured form: name, category picker, cuisine picker, multi-line ingredients, servings stepper, prep/cook time steppers, difficulty picker, star rating slider, notes field, favorite toggle

views.name: HistoryView
views.purpose: Searchable and filterable recipe collection browser with category/cuisine/difficulty filter chips, sort by name/date added/rating/times cooked, swipe actions for favorite toggle and delete

views.name: AnalyticsView
views.purpose: Cooking analytics: cuisine diversity wheel, difficulty distribution bar chart, top-5 most-cooked recipes, collection growth over time line chart, average prep time trend, category breakdown, and generated text insights

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Total number of recipes in collection

viewModelComputedProperties.name: favoriteRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All recipes where isFavorite is true, sorted by rating descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: totalTimesCooked
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of timesCooked across all recipes in the collection

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageRating
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average rating across all recipes that have a rating > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: averageTotalTime
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average of (prepTimeMinutes + cookTimeMinutes) across all recipes

viewModelComputedProperties.name: cuisineBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per cuisine type, sorted by count descending for donut chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: categoryBreakdown
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per meal category, sorted by count descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: difficultyDistribution
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of recipes per difficulty level for bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: mostCookedRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 recipes sorted by timesCooked descending, filtered to timesCooked > 0

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recentlyAdded
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Last 5 recipes added sorted by date descending

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uniqueCuisineCount
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of distinct CuisineType values present in the collection

viewModelComputedProperties.name: recipesThisMonth
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Number of recipes added during the current calendar month

viewModelComputedProperties.name: collectionGrowthData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Cumulative recipe count by month for line chart showing collection growth over time

viewModelComputedProperties.name: uncookedRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Recipes where timesCooked == 0, sorted by date added ascending (oldest uncooked first)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: quickestRecipes
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Top 5 recipes sorted by total time (prep + cook) ascending for quick meal suggestions

viewModelComputedProperties.name: insights
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Generated insight strings: cuisine exploration progress, uncooked recipe count, most-cooked highlight, difficulty trend, category gaps, time stats, rating distribution, collection milestones

dailyGoal.description: Weekly new recipe goal — target number of new recipes to add per week to grow your collection

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A streak week counts if at least 1 new recipe was added or an existing recipe's timesCooked was incremented during that ISO calendar week
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Track four key trends: (1) recipes added per month with month-over-month growth rate, (2) cuisine diversity index = unique cuisines used / 12 total cuisines available, (3) average difficulty of recipes added in rolling 30-day windows to detect skill progression, (4) cooking frequency = total timesCooked increments per week
insights: Cuisine explorer: 'You've explored X of 12 cuisines — try [least-used available cuisine] next!'
Uncooked backlog: 'You have X recipes you haven't cooked yet — [oldest uncooked name] has been waiting since [date]'
Top performer: 'Your most-cooked recipe is [name] with [N] times — it must be a hit!'
Difficulty progression: 'Your last 10 recipes average [X] difficulty vs overall [Y] — you're getting more adventurous!'
Category gaps: 'You have [N] dinner recipes but only [M] breakfast recipes — morning inspiration needed?'
Quick meals: 'Need something fast? [name] only takes [N] minutes total'
Rating insight: '[X]% of your recipes are rated 4+ stars — you have great taste!'
Collection milestone: 'You've saved [N] recipes! Next milestone: [next round number]'
